source: PMC — COPD as Independent Risk Factor for Cardiovascular Disease; ESC 2021

comorbidity_rules.mechanism: Systemic inflammation, hypoxemia, shared risk factors (smoking)
comorbidity_rules.evidence: 90.3% of COPD patients classified as high/very-high cardiovascular risk
comorbidity_rules.simulation_effect: If agent has COPD, multiply CVD incidence probability by 2.5 per tick

comorbidity_rules.evidence: Well-established in Framingham cohort and ESC guidelines
comorbidity_rules.simulation_effect: If agent has T2D, multiply CVD incidence probability by 2.0 per tick
If agent has hypertension, multiply CVD incidence by 1.8 per tick
